addition.item: Improve Mega Menu UX on touch devices
Add option to enable/disable Stagger animation effect
New Section Height & Column Height feature

fix.item: Fix issue where GSAP plugins could not load
Fix issue can not click to top menu link in touch devices
Fix broken ARIA attributes for better accessibility
Fix Deprecated notice null index in array (Row Class)
Fix issue select wrong logo in Dark mode
Fix issue border_radius style conflict in Hover Motion Gallery
